parameters.query:
=SELECT
  ac.id              AS click_id,
  ac.gclid,
  ac.fbclid,
  ac.resolved_jid,
  ac.clicked_at,
  ac.conversion_uploaded_at,
  aa.google_ads_enabled,
  aa.google_ads_customer_id,
  aa.google_ads_developer_token,
  aa.google_ads_refresh_token,
  aa.google_conversion_action_appointment,
  aa.meta_enabled,
  aa.meta_pixel_id,
  aa.meta_access_token,
  aa.meta_test_event_code
FROM public.sf_ad_clicks ac
JOIN public.sf_clinic_ad_accounts aa ON aa.clinic_id = ac.clinic_id
WHERE ac.id = '{{ $json.body.attribution_id }}'

=UPDATE public.sf_ad_clicks
SET conversion_uploaded_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Montar Payload').first().json.click_id }}'

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, click_id: $('Montar Payload').first().json.click_id, google_uploaded: $('Montar Payload').first().json.google_ads_enabled && !!$('Montar Payload').first().json.gclid, meta_uploaded: $('Montar Payload').first().json.meta_enabled && !!$('Montar Payload').first().json.fbclid }) }}
